response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video, identified two distinct vocal music segments. 2. Identified performer Kazamaya Iroha in the first segment and Kazamaya Iroha with La+ Darknesss in the second. 3. Used on-screen text to identify song titles as '白線' and '未来カンパネラ'. 4. Determined both to be original songs for the birthday live. 5. Transcribed full lyrics from the video, as official lyrics were not directly accessible via search. 6. Translated transcribed lyrics to English for the required fields. 7. Structured the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video recording of a birthday live performance by the VTuber Kazamaya Iroha. It features her singing her original song 'Hakusen' followed by a collaborative performance with La+ Darknesss of the song 'Mirai Campanella'.

scenes.description: Kazamaya Iroha performs her original song 'Hakusen'. She dances on a brightly lit stage with screens displaying the song title and lyrics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
紡いでたら「一途」に変わったよ
あたりさわりない言葉じゃ
覆いきれないほどのマイワールド
明日で呼ぶ声の持ち主は
他でもないこの心だ
たった、見えていないその言葉も
「言葉」だと足りないだけ
掴んだもの 落としたもの
転んだって立って 見えた視界から
ロックユー！解き放って
ロックユー！解き放って
フォーユー！響きだして
フォーユー！響きだして
景色変えてゆく
まだ遠く遠くまで
広がった空に
やっと踏み出すこの一歩なんて
ちっぽけだけど
届かない場所へと続いていく
どんな風に雨に消えない
白線をかく
もっと高く高くまで
羽ばたいていたい
そして彼方色で繋ぐ
地平で待ってて
もう願いに嘘はない
ここがスキ！
どんな世界も瞬間も輝く
アイがあるから
今はただ想うこと言えばいい
「愛してるよ！！」

澄み渡った空に白線
不安と期待のアンビバレント
でも君はもう気づいてる
もっと高く高く高く飛んでいける！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When I was spinning, it turned into "Ichizu" (Single-minded).
It's a world of my own that cannot be covered by harmless words.
The owner of the voice that calls out tomorrow is none other than this heart.
It just means that even those words that cannot be seen
are not enough as "words".
Things I grasped, things I dropped.
Even if I fall, I stand up, and from the view I see,
Rock you! Release it.
Rock you! Release it.
For you! Start resounding.
For you! Start resounding.
It changes the scenery.
Still far, far away,
in the spread-out sky,
this one step I finally take
is tiny, but
it continues to a place I cannot reach.
I draw a white line
that will not be erased by any kind of wind or rain.
Higher and higher,
I want to flap my wings.
And with the color of the distance, I connect it.
Wait for me on the horizon.
There are no more lies in my wishes.
I love this place!
Every world and every moment shines
because there is love.
Now I just have to say what I'm thinking:
"I love you!!"
White line in the clear sky.
An ambivalent mix of anxiety and expectation.
But you already know.
Higher and higher and higher, I can fly!

scenes.description: Kazamaya Iroha and La+ Darknesss perform the song 'Mirai Campanella' on stage. The lyrics appear on screen throughout the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
未来カンパネラ
もっと もっと もっと
鏡よ教えて 私の証は
どこにあるのだろう
分からない 分からないよ
周りと比べたってさ
虚しくなるだけ
あのノイズが 涙に似た調べに
涙を奪う
切り取った風景を 道しるべにしよう
そうだ 傷ついた感情も
捨てていくなら
外に響くカンパネラ
新しい未来を感じてる
怖くたって進むしかないでしょ
遠くまで もっと もっと もっと
とどけこの祈りよ光となれ
もっと もっと
少しずつでもいい
私という答えを
もっと もっと
もっと もっと

夜空よ教えて 私の証は
輝けるのかな
見つけたい 見つけたいよ
誰かの決めたレールは
苦しくなるだけ
ねぇ ノイズも力に変えるよ
この心に誓う
錆びついた運命の
歯車を回そう
ほら 飾った感情は
ぬぎ捨てるから
外に紡ぐシンフォニー
叶えたい願いを信じてる
胸を張って歌うしかないでしょ
全力で もっと もっと
やがて希望の歌に変わる
日まで もっと もっと
悩みながらでいい 全てが宝物

いつか この声を 受け取ってくれたなら
この言葉を君に
もう大丈夫 ひとりじゃない
強い想いを
繋ぐよ一歩踏み出してみた
優しく世界は微笑む
高鳴る気持ちに身を任せて
さあ行こう！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Mirai Campanella.
More, more, more.
Mirror, tell me, where is my proof?
I don't know, I don't know.
Even if I compare it to those around me,
it just makes me feel empty.
That noise becomes a melody that resembles tears,
staling my tears.
Let's use the cut-out scenery as a signpost.
That's right, if I'm going to throw away
even my wounded emotions.
The Campanella resounding outside.
I can feel a new future.
Even if I'm scared, I have no choice but to move forward, right?
Far away, more, more, more.
Reach this prayer, let it become light.
More, more.
Even a little bit at a time is fine.
The answer that is "me".
More, more.
More, more.
Night sky, tell me, will my proof shine?
I want to find it, I want to find it.
If the rails decided by someone else,
it just makes it painful.
Hey, I'll turn the noise into strength too.
I swear it in this heart.
Let's turn the gears of the rusted fate.
Look, because I'll throw away the decorated emotions.
The symphony spun outside.
I believe in the wish I want to fulfill.
I have no choice but to sing with my chest puffed out, right?
With all my might, more, more.
Until the day it turns into a song of hope.
More, more.
It's fine to do it while worrying, everything is a treasure.
Someday, if you accepted this voice,
these words to you.
It's okay now, you are not alone.
Strong feelings.
I will connect them, I tried taking a step forward.
Gentle, the world smiles.
Leave your body to the soaring feelings.
Let's go!
